description_long: A collection of six round, flat tablets in pastel colors—yellow, blue, green, and purple—are scattered on a white surface. Each tablet is embossed or scored with distinct markings: some have deep cross or line scores, while others feature unique symbols or characters. The tablets have a matte, slightly rough finish, typical of compressed pharmaceutical pills. The edges are clean and slightly beveled, and the surfaces show minor speckling, suggesting a solid, pressed powder composition. No external packaging or protective seal is visible, and the tablets are not contained within any receptacle. The markings and colors make each tablet visually distinct, possibly indicating different formulations or dosages.
description: Six pastel-colored, round tablets with embossed markings and scored lines, each visually distinct and uncontained.
description_view_0: Front view shows all six tablets, highlighting their varied colors and the unique embossed markings on the top surfaces.
description_view_1: This angle emphasizes the side profiles and reveals the depth of the embossed symbols and scoring on the tablets.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the plain, unmarked sides and backs of the tablets, with less detail visible on the top surfaces.
description_view_3: This view shows the tablets from a low angle, focusing on the side and some top markings, with the green tablet's edge most prominent.
